{{Infobox character
| name = Olissa Agnos
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
| name = Olissa Agnos
| aliases = Olissa
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = wife of Caius
| affiliations = Agnos family
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

''See also: [[Olissa Agnos Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Olissa [[Agnos]] is a skilled craftswoman and the matriarch of the [[Agnos family]], which includes her husband Caius, her daughter Andra, and her sons [[Lycus]] and Caius. She is characterized by her auburn hair—which she has previously cut short—and a tendency to wear work goggles and clothing often smudged with soot or grease. Olissa operates a [[workshop]] where she works alongside her husband to create various items, including masks and prototypes. Her expertise involves working with the artifacts of a [[Territory]] and understanding how to harness the energy of [[Valinhall]], a power she compares to olive oil that requires specific methods to access. Throughout her experiences, she has demonstrated a protective nature toward her children and has interacted with figures such as [[Simon]] and [[Indirial]], occasionally using a mocking curtsy as a social gesture.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|As one of the parents to [[Lycus]] and Andra, Olissa [[Agnos]] provided care by wrapping [[Simon]]'s wounds. While traveling in a wagon, she checked on [[Simon]] and carried a spear for protection. Later, she worked alongside [[Lycus]] to help transport Caius into [[Valinhall]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Olissa is one of [[Lycus]] and Andra's parents.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Olissa wrapped [[Simon]]'s wounds.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Olissa is a woman who checks on [[Simon]] in the wagon.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Olissa is a person who found a spear and was in the wagon.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Olissa and [[Lycus]] helped carry Caius into [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Olissa [[Agnos]] is a tinkerer from the [[Agnos family]] who can be found working in her [[workshop]]. She is characterized by her short, honey-brown hair and the copper goggles she wears, often utilizing work gloves and long-handled tongs during her tasks. While standing by a door, she noted that [[Simon]] would have been left a crippled wreck if not for the magical healing provided by the [[Valinhall]] pool.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Olissa stated that without the magical healing of the [[Valinhall]] pool, [[Simon]] would have been a crippled wreck.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Olissa Agnos]] has honey-brown hair that she cut short.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Olissa Agnos]] wears copper goggles.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Olissa uses long-handled tongs.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Olissa Agnos]] is a woman who wears goggles and work gloves.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Olissa is part of the [[Agnos family]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Olissa is a tinkerer.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Olissa is a woman who works in the [[workshop]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Olissa was standing by the door.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Mentioned by the [[Eldest]] [[Nye]], Olissa [[Agnos]] is the wife of Caius. She previously directed [[Simon]] to utilize the pool and was later observed present in his bedroom. During her time working on new versions of [[Simon's mask]], she explained the necessity of providing a room to contain a power so that different powers do not mix.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Olissa Agnos]] is a person mentioned by the [[Eldest]] [[Nye]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c1">''City of Light'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Olissa ordered [[Simon]] to use the pool.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Olissa is working on new versions of [[Simon's mask]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Olissa Agnos]] is the wife of Caius.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Olissa explained that a power needs a room to contain it so different powers do not mix.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Olissa was present in [[Simon]]'s bedroom.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Caius! Olissa!" Lycus and Andra’s parents looked up.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“She's been working on the new versions, and she's mentioned more than once that she could use the prototype.”<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Olissa pointed to Simon with the bottle’s corked tip. "Exactly! So this power needs something to hold it. You see where I’m going with this? It needs a room to contain it."<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Agnos family]]
